description: CompositionBurgundy round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with bold chest printFitting Comfort Washcare Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery If karma is what you believe in as the foundation of your existence, then this tee from tantra is a great way to broadcast your belief.
